sourcesContent:
// src/pin-input.props.ts
import { createProps } from "@zag-js/types";
import { createSplitProps } from "@zag-js/utils";
var props = createProps()([
  "autoFocus",
  "blurOnComplete",
  "count",
  "defaultValue",
  "dir",
  "disabled",
  "form",
  "getRootNode",
  "id",
  "ids",
  "invalid",
  "mask",
  "name",
  "onValueChange",
  "onValueComplete",
  "onValueInvalid",
  "otp",
  "pattern",
  "placeholder",
  "readOnly",
  "required",
  "selectOnFocus",
  "translations",
  "type",
  "value"
]);
var splitProps = createSplitProps(props);
export {
  props,
  splitProps
};
